Services.title: Our Services
Services.subtitle: Professional construction and design services tailored to your needs

architecturalDesign.title: Architectural Design
architecturalDesign.description: We craft bespoke architectural plans that blend aesthetics with functionality. From concept sketches to detailed blueprints, we design homes that reflect your personality.

generalContracting.title: General Contracting
generalContracting.description: Full project management from groundbreaking to handover. We coordinate all trades, manage timelines, and ensure your home is built to the highest standards.

supervision.title: Construction Supervision
supervision.description: Our experienced engineers provide on-site supervision to ensure your builder adheres to the approved plans and quality standards.

costEstimation.title: Cost Estimation
costEstimation.description: Get a detailed, itemized budget breakdown before committing to construction. We help you understand where every franc goes.
